name: Rebaked Potato with Tofu-Mushroom Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, combine chopped onion, chopped mushrooms, soy sauce, and sage.
2. Cover and stew over low heat until the mushrooms are tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Cut baked potatoes in half lengthwise. Carefully scoop out the insides, leaving a shell about 1/4 inch thick.
4. Puree the scooped-out potato, mashed tofu, and salt in a food processor, or whip them together by hand, making the mixture as smooth as possible.
5. Stir in all but a quarter cup of the cooked mushroom-onion mixture into the pureed mixture.
6. Fill the potato shells with the prepared filling.
7. Top each half with 1 tablespoon of the reserved mushroom-onion mixture.
8. Place potatoes on a baking sheet and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
Makes 4 potato halves.
